title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Sprinters Stakes, King Halo
looks at her image on a poster displayed for all to
see and grins proudly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfazed by the reporters, she interacts with her
fans as she makes her way to the waiting room.
It's clear that her popularity is sharply rising.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Here comes the racer we've all got our eyes on,
the one who dominated earlier this year in spring!
The quee—I mean, King!" There's no mistaking
that she's become the headliner of today's race to
decide the best sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Everyone's eyes are on King Halo!
